creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 2010-08-10 at 01:16:57 +0000, Eitan Adler wrote:

> -PORTVERSION=	2.2.4
> +PORTVERSION=	2.2.5
>  PORTREVISION=	1

For future reference: if PORTVERSION is increasing, then you should
reset PORTREVISION to 0 (by removing its definition from the Makefile).

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
